message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant ListPrivateImpl
participant ProfileRetrievalService
participant DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl
participant DFSSystem
participant DFSConnectionService
participant DFSConnectionServiceImpl
participant GsonSerde
participant BucketAccessService
participant BucketAccessServiceImpl
participant DFSCredentialsService
participant DFSCredentialsServiceImpl
participant DocumentListService
participant ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl
participant ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl

actor User

User ->> ListPrivateImpl: resolvePrivateLocation
ListPrivateImpl ->> ProfileRetrievalService: privateProfile
ProfileRetrievalService ->> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: privateProfile
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl ->> DFSSystem: systemDFSs
DFSSystem ->> DFSConnectionService: obtain
DFSConnectionService ->> DFSConnectionServiceImpl: obtain
DFSConnectionServiceImpl ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: obtain
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: obtain
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: obtain

User ->> ListPrivateImpl: locatePrivateProfile
ListPrivateImpl ->> BucketAccessService: BucketPath
BucketAccessService ->> GsonSerde: getBlob
GsonSerde ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: Payload
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: fromjson
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: T
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPrivateImpl: UserPrivateProfile
ListPrivateImpl ->> User: UserPrivateProfile

User ->> ListPrivateImpl: privateAccessFor
ListPrivateImpl ->> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: privateAccessFor
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl ->> DFSSystem: systemDFSs
DFSSystem ->> DFSConnectionService: DFSAccess
DFSConnectionService ->> DFSConnectionServiceImpl: DFSAccess
DFSConnectionServiceImpl ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: privateUserCredentials
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: privateUserCredentials
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: DFSCredentials
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl ->> DFSConnectionService: DFSCredentials
DFSConnectionService ->> DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl: DFSAccess
DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl ->> ListPrivateImpl: list
ListPrivateImpl ->> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: list
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: Stream
ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl: Stream
ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl ->> ListPathNonDecryptingServiceImpl: Stream

@enduml
